name: coordinate-github-repositories
description: Adaptive GitHub repository access, inventory, routing, coordination, and tool-fit guidance for code and non-code work.

interface.shortDescription: Adapt repository coordination to the person and work.
interface.longDescription: Diagnose GitHub access, inventory repositories, route cross-repository work, and compare proportionate tools without imposing a code-only taxonomy or replacement workflow.
defaultPrompt: Help me understand and coordinate my repositories.
Compare repository organization options for my work.
Diagnose which GitHub repositories my agent can access.
